overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through a medieval village at dusk during overcast weather. The character moves from narrow village streets past NPCs and a cart, then exits into open countryside with forests and mountains in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow village alley between stone cottages

events.description: white chicken crosses the wooden path from right to left

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow village alley with swords on back

notable_agents.action: chicken crossing the wooden plank path

entered.detail: rough stone wall of a village cottage running along the left side
rough stone wall of a village cottage running along the right side
traditional building with straw thatched roof visible in the background
simple wooden picket fence along the right side of the path
wooden planks laid down as a walkway through the muddy alley

segments.scene_description: Walking through a narrow enclosed village alley with stone cottage walls on both sides and wooden planks underfoot. The sky is mostly blocked by the surrounding buildings, creating a dim atmosphere. A white chicken crosses the path around the 6-second mark, the only movement in the otherwise empty alley.

events.description: path widens from narrow village alley to open outskirts with visible sky
passing the wooden cart and villager on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing a villager standing near a wooden cart at the village edge

notable_agents.action: villager in dark clothing standing near the path watching Geralt approach
wooden cart with large wheels parked beside the dirt path

entered.detail: rustic wooden structure with timber framing on the right side
unpaved dirt trail replacing the wooden planks

segments.scene_description: The path widens as Geralt approaches the village outskirts, transitioning from wooden planks to dirt ground. A wooden building appears on the right while the stone cottage wall continues on the left but recedes into the distance. A villager stands near a parked wooden cart, creating a brief interaction point as Geralt passes by.

scene_state.functional_zone: open countryside with forest and mountains

events.description: exits the village completely into open grassland with distant forest
crossing a small pond or puddle in the middle of the path

agents.ego_description: walking through open grassland leaving the village behind, heading toward the forest

entered.detail: open grassy meadow stretching out in all directions
dense coniferous forest covering the distant hills
shallow pool of water collected in a depression in the path
mountain peaks visible on the horizon beneath the cloudy sky
remnant of a stone wall on the right side marking the village boundary

segments.scene_description: Exiting the village completely into wide open grassland with full sky visibility. The dirt trail continues through the meadow toward a distant pine forest and mountains. A small pond appears in the path around 30 seconds, reflecting the overcast sky. The village buildings are left behind, replaced by natural landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a dim, enclosed village alley into a vast, open countryside under an overcast sky. It begins by navigating a narrow path between stone cottage walls with wooden planks underfoot, where a lone white chicken crosses the way. As the path widens, the wooden planks give way to dirt ground and the surrounding buildings recede, passing a villager standing beside a parked wooden cart at the village outskirts. The scene then expands completely into wide grassland, leaving the village structures behind as the trail leads toward a distant pine forest and mountains. Finally, the camera glides past a small pond reflecting the gray sky, fully immersing the view in the natural landscape.
